chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-882 of 2024 Abdul Ghafoor & others Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order son office objections No.9 and 13. 2. For orders on Misc. No.4208/24 3. For orders on Misc. No.4209/24 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.05.2024 Mr. Arsalan Wahid for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners has made a statement that he has been instructed not to press this petition. Accordingly, petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
